NAVAREA XIX 135/24
 SCIENTIFIC SOUNDING ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE, OKSEBAASEN IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD FROM
  27.OCT  TO 17.NOV 24. BETWEEN 1800-0300 UTC,
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS:
  
 DANGER AREA INNER
 A. 69-17.00N 016-02.10E
 B. 69-21.70N 016-09.00E
 C. 69-25.50N 015-58.00E
 D. 69-24.00N 015-48.00E
 E. 69-18.40N 015-47.50E
 F. 69-17.00N 016-02.10E
  
 DANGER AREA OUTER
 A. 71-52.00N 014-50.00E
 B. 71-25.00N 011-17.00E
 C. 69-53.00N 014-00.00E
 D. 70-05.00N 015-30.00E
 E. 70-18.00N 016-10.00E
 F. 71-52.00N 014-50.00E
